{{CargoRelic
|name=Gene Map
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-13
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Evolution Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Jun 13, 1985, the Human Genome Project was first proposed to study the base pairs of human DNA.

The significance of Gene Map: Discovering the entire sequence of 3 billion base pairs in the human genome, the position of chromosomes, all human genetic information, and understanding humans at the molecular level for the treatment of diseases.
|fame=49
|art=37
|fth=41
|civ=44
|tech=72
|ss1=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +12<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50
|ss2=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +16<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +16<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50
|ss3=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +20<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +20<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50
|ss4=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +28<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +28<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50
|ss5=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +36<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +36<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50
|ss7=Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail ATK +36<br>Per 5 Cloning Tank LVLs, Snail DEF +36<br> Cloning Tank LVL:50/50<br>Minion Cloning B-tad Cost -2.8% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]] Place in the Gene Sim Device: Wind DMG +60
|skill2=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]] Place in the Gene Sim Device: Power Checks in Gene Simulations -5%
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[category:Cloning Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Cloning Tank LVL]]
